MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-21-2002 Continued To Dec-02-02 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-02-2002 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Eric L. Throne. David G. Mendez, Esq, appeared for the Plaintiff, S.S. Patel and there being no appearance by Defendant, Summerlane Danner, the Court ordered the matter off settlement conference, request for jury trial is stricken and the trial date is confirmed.
